title: 10 Marks of a Man Who Has Actually Met God
caption:
You can tell. You can't always say how — but you can tell.

The man who's actually met God is different in ways that aren't loud. He doesn't need to be the loudest in the room. He takes responsibility before anyone asks. He's genuinely glad when another man wins.

None of those things come from self-improvement. They come from being in the presence of something that rearranges you.

Which of these do you see in the men you respect most? Save this — and pass it to the man you're trying to become.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #christianity #discipleship #character #humility
